title: lolium arundinaceum subsp. uechtritzianum
intro: Lolium arundinaceum subsp. uechtritzianum, also known as tall fescue or Koeler's grass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lolium arundinaceum subsp. uechtritzianum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal agent.
